candidates.title: A Bilingual Pashto Speech and Text Dataset for Low-Resource Language Research (BPSTD)
candidates.summary: We introduce the Bilingual Pashtu Speech and Text Dataset (BPSTD) for low-resource language research. BPSTD is a bilingual speech-text dataset created to facilitate research in Pashto voice processing, speech recognition, and text-to-speech
candidates.primary_use: Needs maintainer review before promotion to verified catalog.

pashto_evidence.evidence_text: DataCite metadata includes Pashto markers in title or description.

candidates.title: DNN acoustic modeling with modular multi-lingual feature extraction networks
candidates.summary: In this work, we propose several deep neural network architectures that are able to leverage data from multiple languages. Modularity is achieved by training networks for extracting high-level features and for estimating phoneme state poste
candidates.primary_use: Needs maintainer review before promotion to verified catalog.
